rulings.Case Title: GEORGE MICHAEL SHUEY VS. KARIN L ANDERSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Substitute Successor Trustee For Deceased Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Monday, September 21, 2015, line 2. PLAINTIFF GEORGE SHUEY's Motion To Substitute Successor Trustee For Deceased Plaintiff Hearing Required. Plaintiff to file and serve a declaration in compliance with CCP 377.32 no later than 9:00 a.m. on September 21, 2015. Courtesy copy to be delivered to Department 501 no later than 9:15 a.m. on September 21, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DHIREN GADARIYA VS. WAYNE JOHNSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for Monday, September 21, 2015, line 9. DEFENDANT WAYNE JOHNSON's Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment Hearing Required. Defendant shall produce the following at the hearing: (1) declaration and pictures showing that his room is ready for bed bug treatment and that the excessive belongings have been removed. See (April 24, 2015 Abatement Conference Decision); and (2) doctor's letter stating that Defendant's mental and/or physical condition prevented Defendant from understating the summons. ("You have 5 CALENDAR DAYS after this summons and legal papers are served on you to file a written response at this court."). = (501/REQ)
